name: What's Wrong with Secretary Kim
overview: Lee Young-Joon's family runs a large company and he works as the vice-president of the company. He is smart, rich and handsome, but he is arrogant. His secretary is Kim Mi-So. She has worked for him for years and she is perfect for him, but Kim Mi-So decides to quit her job.

trailers.title: WHAT'S WRONG WITH SECRETARY KIM - OFFICIAL TRAILER [Eng Sub] | Park Seo Joon, Park Min Young
